title: Your roadmap to MTD success
summaryBody: Get MTD done with five simple steps to MTD success that your Practice can follow today
detailBody: Follow the simple steps to MTD success

1. Prepare.
 
Segment clients, plan your workflow, and build your MTD strategy early.
- Write down your plan. Create a clear MTD plan that everyone understands. If your staff can’t explain it back to you, it’s likely too complicated.
- Know your audience. Segment your clients so you know exactly who’s affected and which team in your practice will be looking after them.
- Assign ownership and stay vocal. Decide who’s running the show and how you’ll chase unresponsive clients. Have a backup plan for when your first round of comms goes ignored.
2. Pricing.
Define a clear, profitable pricing model that reflects the value of digital bookkeeping.

- Value your time. Don’t undersell yourself. Charging what you’re worth now protects your business for the long run.
- Choose your pricing model. Whether it’s monthly fees or annual payments, pick a structure that’s clear and consistent and works for you.
- Scale a viable workflow. Avoid quick fixes and sticky plaster solutions. Use Wave 1 to stress test your workflows in preparation for Wave 2.
3. People.
Equip your team and clients with the knowledge and confidence to embrace change.
- Get your team on board. MTD is a big shift, so listen to your staff concerns. If the team isn't behind the plan, your internal processes will struggle.
- Run a pre-mortem. Don't wait for things to go wrong. Spot potential potholes with your team now so you have a "Plan B" ready before you need it.
- Pick the right partners. Ensure your software vendors offer fast support. Teams waiting days for a response will make the situation worse.
4. Process.
Use automation, smart tools, and clear filing routines to reduce admin.
- Align your plan with reality. Make sure the person doing the work is actually following your strategy. If there’s a gap, it’s time to realign.
- Choose client-friendly tools. Use software your clients can actually handle. If it’s too complex for them, you’ll end up doing the heavy lifting yourself.
- Audit and automate your tech. Map out your integrations and automate what you can now. If tools aren't working for you, you're losing time.
5. Prosper.
Unlock MTD growth by scaling efficiency and strengthening client relationships.
- Speak to your clients now. It’s time to switch up the generic emails and reach out directly.
- Start to sign them up on HMRC. The process takes time so make it part of your weekly workflow.
- Add all clients to your FreeAgent Dashboard. Access bulk actions and speed up your workflow
- Book session with your Account Manager. If there are stakeholders and staff that need to know about FreeAgent then do this now!
